concepts.name: justice
concepts.definition_snippet: Treatment of individuals fairly; constant will to render to each his due

concepts.name: fairness
concepts.definition_snippet: Impartial distribution of goods, foundation of justice

concepts.name: distributive justice
concepts.definition_snippet: What is fair based on distribution of goods between whom and proper distribution

concepts.name: retributive justice
concepts.definition_snippet: Punishment should be proportional to the crime

concepts.name: restorative justice
concepts.definition_snippet: Focuses on needs of victims and offenders, repairing harm

concepts.name: morality
concepts.definition_snippet: Moral fairness and administration of law

concepts.name: law
concepts.definition_snippet: System of enforceable rules connected to justice

concepts.name: virtue
concepts.definition_snippet: Justice is one of the cardinal virtues

concepts.name: social justice
concepts.definition_snippet: Just relationship between individuals and society

concepts.name: property rights
concepts.definition_snippet: Distributive justice based on individual entitlement history

concepts.name: meritocracy
concepts.definition_snippet: Goods distributed to match individual merit
